blended.narrative: Mont Blanc is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,720 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 5" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
